title: depth limit is 101 levels not 100 as documented
description: TRIGGER: a script with exactly 101 levels of nested if blocks. BAD BEHAVIOR: compiles OK when the error message says the maximum is 100. ROOT CAUSE: form.rs uses 'depth > MAX_NESTING_DEPTH' (strict greater-than). With MAX_NESTING_DEPTH=100, depth=100 passes the check (100 > 100 = false) and depth=101 triggers the error. The actual enforced limit is 101, not 100. The error message 'script nesting depth exceeds maximum (100)' is incorrect. Fix: change to 'depth >= MAX_NESTING_DEPTH' in both read_stmt and read_test_stmt. The existing test at 200 levels passes regardless and does not detect this discrepancy.
